LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT G.I.S.F., INC.'S, D.B.A. FELICCI & CO., DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ALLEGE HOW HE WAS DENIED FULL AND EQUAL ACCESS TO GOODS AND SERVICES. THE ELDER ABUSE STATUTES WERE ENACTED TO PROTECT ELDERS FROM ABUSIVE FAMILY MEMBERS AND RETAILERS. THE ACT DOES NOT APPLY TO THE FACTS ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOS. TO DEFT'S MTN TO STRIKE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONIFACE, CRAIG

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT G.I.S.F., INC.'S, D.B.A. FELICCI & CO., DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED AS TO THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TWENTY DAYS: FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD FACTS THAT ESTABLISH A DUTY OF CARE; FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD THE PROPER CODE SECTION; AND SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT, AS A RETAILER, IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE HEALTH OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT G.I.S.F., INC.'S, D.B.A. FELICCI & CO., MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ATTORNEYS' FEES UNDER THE UNRUH ACT. DENIED AS TO EMOTIONAL DISTRESS DAMAGES IN THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION; GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION THAT ALLEGE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS DAMAGES. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT G.I.S.F., INC.'S, D.B.A. FELICCI & CO., MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OBJECT TO STRIKING THE CLAIM FOR PENALTIES AND LIQUIDATED DAMAGES. THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES IS GRANTED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DOES NOT AFFECT THE GENERAL PUBLIC OR A LARGE CLASS OF PERSONS. JUDGE: PATRICK J. THE COURT MAKES NO RULINGS AS TO THE SUFFICIENCY OF SAID RESPONSES. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,440 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories, Set One; And To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant GISF Inc.'s motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories, requests for production of documents, and requests for admissions is moot as responses have been served. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of said responses. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,440 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
